title: Sara opens notebook — MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN
prompt: Tight close-up shot on the dry sand of @beach-sunset — soft golden-hour light raking from the right, gentle pastel sunset gradient in the background. @Sara already CENTER-FRAME seated cross-legged on a folded beach towel on the dry sand, the open @sara-notebook-rescue spread softly across her lap, a chunky purple crayon held gently in her right hand. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. The notebook page already shows the title 'MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN' in big handwritten letters at the top, with a small drawing of the glowing aqua-blue bottle next to it. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara is gently mid-drawing — her right hand softly adding a small island shape and a dotted-line route to the page, the chunky purple crayon making soft marks. Sara softly bites her lower lip in cute concentration, brow gently scrunched. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara gently adds a small letter 'X' on the dotted line and lets out a tiny satisfied warm hum. Sara (gentle thoughtful warm voice to herself): "Bottle... island... X marks the spot." Calm cheerful kid-show family ambiance throughout — gentle distant surf, soft seabirds. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — right hand drawing with crayon, left hand softly resting on the notebook page. Sara stays seated cross-legged on the towel throughout — no jumping, no leaping. The sand and notebook stay plain clean — no marks (other than the rescue plan drawing), no red, no liquid spills.
